mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = '게시중'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = '대기'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = '게시중'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = '마감'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_APPLICATION A JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING J ON A.FK_JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID WHERE J.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND A.CANCELLED_AT IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_APPLICATION A JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING J ON A.FK_JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID WHERE J.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND A.CANCELLED_AT IS NULL AND A.VIEWED_AT IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_APPLICATION A JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING J ON A.FK_JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID WHERE J.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND A.CANCELLED_AT IS NULL AND A.PROCESS_STATUS = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_APPLICATION A JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING J ON A.FK_JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID WHERE J.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND A.CANCELLED_AT IS NULL AND A.PROCESS_STATUS = 3
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_OFFER_SUBMIT OS JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING JP ON OS.FK_JOB_ID = JP.JOB_ID WHERE JP.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_OFFER_RESPONSE ORR JOIN TBL_OFFER_SUBMIT OS ON ORR.FK_OFFER_SUBMIT_ID = OS.OFFER_SUBMIT_ID JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING JP ON OS.FK_JOB_ID = JP.JOB_ID WHERE JP.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND ORR.RESPONSE_STATUS = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_OFFER_RESPONSE ORR JOIN TBL_OFFER_SUBMIT OS ON ORR.FK_OFFER_SUBMIT_ID = OS.OFFER_SUBMIT_ID JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING JP ON OS.FK_JOB_ID = JP.JOB_ID WHERE JP.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND ORR.RESPONSE_STATUS = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_OFFER_RESPONSE ORR JOIN TBL_OFFER_SUBMIT OS ON ORR.FK_OFFER_SUBMIT_ID = OS.OFFER_SUBMIT_ID JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING JP ON OS.FK_JOB_ID = JP.JOB_ID WHERE JP.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND ORR.RESPONSE_STATUS = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BANNER WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = '처리중'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BANNER WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = '승인완료'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BANNER WHERE FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND STATUS = '반려'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT J.JOB_ID AS jobId, J.TITLE AS title, J.WORK_TYPE AS workTypeText, J.STATUS AS status, J.STATUS AS statusText, J.DEADLINE_AT AS deadlineAt, NVL(J.VIEW_COUNT, 0) AS viewCount, NVL(J.HEADCOUNT, 0) AS headcount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_APPLICATION A WHERE A.FK_JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID AND A.CANCELLED_AT IS NULL ) AS applicantCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_SCRAP S WHERE S.FK_JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID ) AS scrapCount
FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING J WHERE J.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND J.STATUS != '삭제됨' ORDER BY J.CREATED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.APPLICATION_ID AS applicationId, A.NAME AS applicantName, SR.TITLE AS resumeTitle, J.TITLE AS jobTitle, A.APPLIED_AT AS appliedAt, A.PROCESS_STATUS AS processStatus,
CASE A.PROCESS_STATUS WHEN 0 THEN '미열람' WHEN 1 THEN '열람' WHEN 2 THEN '서류탈락' WHEN 3 THEN '면접요청' WHEN 4 THEN '합격' WHEN 5 THEN '불합격' ELSE '대기' END AS processStatusText
FROM TBL_JOB_APPLICATION A JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING J ON A.FK_JOB_ID = J.JOB_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_SUBMITTED_RESUME SR ON A.FK_SUBMITTED_RESUME_ID = SR.SUBMITTED_RESUME_ID WHERE J.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} AND A.CANCELLED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY A.APPLIED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT OL.OFFER_LETTER_ID AS offerLetterId, OL.TITLE AS title, JP.TITLE AS jobTitle, NVL(S.totalSentCount, 0) AS totalSentCount, NVL(R.pendingCount, 0) AS unreadCount, NVL(R.acceptedCount, 0) AS acceptedCount, NVL(R.rejectedCount, 0) AS rejectedCount, MAX(OS.EXPIRE_AT) AS expireAt FROM TBL_OFFER_LETTER OL JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING JP ON OL.FK_JOB_ID = JP.JOB_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_OFFER_SUBMIT OS ON OL.OFFER_LETTER_ID = OS.FK_OFFER_LETTER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FK_OFFER_LETTER_ID AS offerLetterId, COUNT(*) AS totalSentCount FROM TBL_OFFER_SUBMIT GROUP BY FK_OFFER_LETTER_ID ) S ON OL.OFFER_LETTER_ID = S.offerLetterId LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OS.FK_OFFER_LETTER_ID AS offerLetterId, SUM(CASE WHEN ORR.RESPONSE_STATUS = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ORR.RESPONSE_STATUS = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS acceptedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN ORR.RESPONSE_STATUS = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejectedCount FROM TBL_OFFER_SUBMIT OS LEFT JOIN TBL_OFFER_RESPONSE ORR ON ORR.FK_OFFER_SUBMIT_ID = OS.OFFER_SUBMIT_ID GROUP BY OS.FK_OFFER_LETTER_ID ) R ON OL.OFFER_LETTER_ID = R.offerLetterId WHERE JP.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} GROUP BY OL.OFFER_LETTER_ID, OL.TITLE, JP.TITLE, S.totalSentCount, R.pendingCount, R.acceptedCount, R.rejectedCount, OL.CREATED_AT ORDER BY OL.CREATED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
